backend_rationale: No OpenSpec in this project. Single-tool (Claude Code) execution with progress.json bookkeeping. Hybrid not warranted at this scale.

next_action.description: Execute change m4-docs-mdx-sweep (M4): 120 .mdx files in docs/src/app/** flipped via an extended enforce-branding.py that skips fenced code blocks. Single-word prose-only edits — biggest churn of the phase.

phase_progress: 3/7 milestones done (M1, M2, M3). Next: M4 docs MDX sweep.
